_documentation: Iteration 001 baseline. See CLAUDE.md for metric definitions.
audit_note: Reconstructed 2026-05-16 — original Phase 1 metrics.json was overwritten by Phase 2 run on 2026-05-15. Values sourced from registry.csv (recall_val, precision_val, recall_train, generalization_gap), benchmark_audit.jsonl (val_recall_fatal independently confirmed), iteration_log.md (flag_rate 31.7%), and Phase 1 parquet files (all support counts). Train precision/FP/TN/flag_rate not recorded in any source of truth and are set null. TP/FP/TN/FN on val computed from sourced values.

train._source: recall_combined exact from registry.csv. TP/FN derived from recall_combined x support_positive. Support counts exact from train_featured.parquet. Precision/FP/TN/flag_rate not recorded in any Phase 1 source of truth.

val._source: recall_combined, precision exact from registry.csv. recall_fatal exact from registry.csv + benchmark_audit.jsonl + iteration_log.md (3 independent sources). flag_rate exact from iteration_log.md (31.7%). Support counts exact from val_featured.parquet. recall_injury, f1, TP/FP/TN/FN derived from the above.

benchmark.note: Benchmark not run at iteration 001 (per protocol: B1 at iteration 5). B2 end-of-phase audit recorded in experiments/benchmark_audit.jsonl.

diagnostics._source: generalization_gap exact from registry.csv. overfitting_warning derived (0.0642 < 0.10 threshold). fatal_recall_floor_check derived (0.508 >= 0.50 floor).
